mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_reply (reply_no, board_no, reply_text, replyer, parent_no) VALUES (board_reply_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{replyText}, #{replyer}, #{parentNo})
mapper.select: SELECT reply_no, board_no, reply_text, replyer, parent_no, reg_date FROM board_reply WHERE board_no = #{boardNo} START WITH parent_no = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR reply_no = parent_no ORDER SIBLINGS BY reply_no DESC
